original_text:
Australia 2-0 Turkiye Highlights, FIFA World Cup 2026: Irakunda, Metcalfe Shine As Socceroos Stun Crescent Stars
Nestroy Irakunda scored a 27th minute goal to take Australia 1-0 up against Turkey in FIFA World Cup Group D match. X/CommBank Socceroos
Australia Vs Turkiye Highlights, FIFA World Cup 2026: Hello and welcome to the highlights of the Group D match between The Socceroos and Crescent Stars at BC Place, Vancouver, Canada on Sunday, June 14. Paul Okon-Engstler gave a long ball to Nestroy Irakunda, who displayed amazing footwork to get past the Turkish defense and fired a low shot pastu Ugurcan Cakir. He also etched his name as the youngest goal-scorer for Australia in the World Cups. Socceroos defense was on point as they didn't gave many opportunities to Turkey to turn into a goal. However, Arda Guler got one, who created an chance along with captain Orkun Kokcu but the ball went over the post. Connor Metcalfe doubled the lead in the 75th minute with a low and hard shot into the bottom corner.
LIVE UPDATES
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Welcome!
Hello football fans! We're back with the live coverage of the Group D match of the FIFA World Cup 2026 between Australia and Turkiye at the BC Place in Vancouver, Canada. Stay tuned for the live score and play-by-play updates of the match.
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Match Details
Date: Sunday, 14 June 2026
Kick-off Time: 09:30 AM IST
Venue: BC Place, Vancouver, Canada
Tournament: FIFA World Cup 2026™ — Group D (Match 6)
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Streaming Details
The FIFA World Cup 2026 will be telecast live on Unite8 Sports network on television. For live streaming, one can catch the action on the Zee5 app and website.
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Socceroos Starting XI
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Crescent Stars Starting XI
Cakir (GK), Celik, Demiral, Bardakci, Kadioglu, Kokcu, Calhanoglu (c), Yuksek, Akturkoglu, Guler, Yilmaz
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Match Is Underway
The national anthems and other pre-match formalities are done. The referee blows the whistle and with it Australia get the ball rolling.
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: 14' | AUS 0-0 TUR
Baris Yilmaz attempted to pick out a teammate with a forward pass, but the delivery lacked precision and drifted into an area occupied by neither side. With no Turkish player able to latch onto it, the promising attack fizzled out harmlessly.
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: 27' | AUS 1-0 TUR
Australia's Nestroy Irakunda gets a beautiful pass and finds him one-on-one with the goalkeeper. Irakunda makes the most of the golden opportunity and fires the ball into the bottom left corner to get Australia 1-0 ahead in the game.
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Halftime' | AUS 1-0 TUR
That the halftime whistle by the referee and with it the stoppage time comes to an end and both set of players are heading back to their respective locker rooms. Australia would be the happier time as they are leading by 1-0 at halftime courtesy of a 27th minute goal by Nestroy Irakunda.
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: 55' | AUS 1-0 TUR
Harry Souttar climbed highest to meet the corner, but the goalkeeper produced a superb save to deny his header from finding the bottom-left corner.
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: 65' | AUS 1-0 TUR
Arda Guler launches a monstrous piledriver. He controlled the ball well and fired a shot from the edge of the D. It could have been a tricky one for the goalkeeper but fortunately for Australia, the ball deflected after hitting one of the defenders.
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: 75' | AUS 2-0 TUR
Goaalll... Australia doubles their advantage as Connor Metcalfe tricks his way past his opponents and fires a scintillating shot from the edge of the box into the bottom right corner. Turkey goalkeeper had no chance of reaching to the ball and the lead goes to 2-0.
Australia Vs Turkiye LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Fulltime| AUS 2-0 TUR
That's the final whistle and with it the stoppage time comes to an end. Australia beat Turkey in their opening game of the World Cup by 2-0 courtesy of goals from Nestroy Irakunda and Connor Metcalfe.
